HYDROARC 127/26.
1. HYDROARC WARNINGS IN FORCE AS OF 101500Z JUL. ALL THE INFORCE WARNINGS ARE LISTED   
   HERE.
   126/2026, 124/2026, 123/2026, 180/2025, 178/2025, 175/2025, 148/2025, 145/2025, 103/2025, 283/2024,   
   163/2023, 198/2022.
2. THE COMPLETE TEXT OF ALL IN-FORCE HYDROARC 
    BROADCAST WARNINGS ARE AVAILABLE ON THE NGA
    MARITIME SAFETY INFORMATION WEBSITE AT:
    MSI.NGA.MIL/NAVWARNINGS.
    ALTERNATIVELY, THESE MAY BE REQUESTED BY E-MAIL
    FROM NGA AT NAVSAFETY@NGA.MIL.
3. CANCEL HYDROARC 120/26.
